title: The Enderite particle
description: New ore with an end feel too it and stronger then netherite.
body:
This mod adds Enderite and a way to get it from smelting the Enderite ore.
The materials has no use for now and can not be found naturaly.
A new creative mode tab for the mod has ben added where materials can be found.

Coders:
Zim_Drakprinsen

Textures:
Zim_Drakprinsen



ps if you want to make textures for upcoming versions of the mod, dm zim.draken on discord or join the discord server linked.
(you wont be paid but do to the project being only for fun altho i will add your name in the next update of the mod)
